zh.lifeSummary: 當Alvaradis De Chiny於1110年出生時，她的父親Otton II de Chiny45歲，母親Adélaïs de Namur44歲。她於1130年與Herman II van Cuijk在荷蘭努-布拉班特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1170年在荷蘭努-布拉班特可享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alvaradis De Chiny于1110年出生时，她的父亲Otton II de Chiny45岁，母亲Adélaïs de Namur44岁。她于1130年与Herman II van Cuijk在荷兰努-布拉班特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1170年在荷兰努-布拉班特可享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surnames 荊, 景, 井, 敬, 靖 and 經, see   Jing   1-6.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 程, see   Cheng   1.

variants.name: Chinn
meanings: English: from Old English cin ‘chin’, as a nickname for someone with a prominent chin or else for a clean-shaven man.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 陳 (see   Chen   1) and 錢 (see   Qian   1).

en.lifeSummary: When Alvaradis De Chiny was born in 1110, her father, Otton II de Chiny, was 45 and her mother, Adélaïs de Namur, was 44. She married Herman II van Cuijk in 1130, in North Brabant, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1170, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alvaradis De Chiny est née en 1110, son père, Otton II de Chiny, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Adélaïs de Namur, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Herman II van Cuijk en 1130, à Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1170, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alvaradis De Chiny 1110 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otton II de Chiny 45 und ihre Mutter Adélaïs de Namur 44. Sie hat 1130 in Nord-Brabant, Niederlande Herman II van Cuijk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alvaradis De Chiny è nata il nel 1110, sua padre, Otton II de Chiny, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Adélaïs de Namur, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Herman II van Cuijk nel 1130, nel Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1170, nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alvaradis De Chinyが1110年に生まれた時，父Otton II de Chinyは45歳，母Adélaïs de Namurは44歳であった。1130年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントでHerman II van Cuijkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1170年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alvaradis De Chiny(이)가 1110년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otton II de Chiny(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïs de Namur(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1130년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트에서 Herman II van Cuijk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 c이j크에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt., Cuijk, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alvaradis De Chiny nasceu em 1110, seu pai, Otton II de Chiny, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïs de Namur, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Herman II van Cuijk em 1130, em Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1170, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alvaradis De Chiny родилась в 1110 г., её отцу по имени Otton II de Chiny было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïs de Namur, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herman II van Cuijk в 1130 г. в местности нурд-брабант, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1170 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 60 лет.

es., Cuijk, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alvaradis De Chiny nació en 1110, su papá, Otton II de Chiny, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Adélaïs de Namur, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Herman II van Cuijk en 1130, en Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1170, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 60 años.
